title: conyza hirtella
intro: Conyza hirtella, also known as hairy fleabane, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to South America. The medicinal properties of Conyza hirtella lie in its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and aid in the treatment of wounds. Conyza hirtella can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
